seoTitle: Kalunga vs Kamerunga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kalunga and Kamerunga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kalunga and Kamerunga.
heading: Kalunga vs Kamerunga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kalunga, Queensland and Kamerunga, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kalunga has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Kamerunga (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kalunga or Kamerunga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kalunga has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kamerunga scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kalunga scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Kamerunga scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kalunga or Kamerunga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kalunga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
